title: rhododendron molle f. canescens
intro: Rhododendron molle f. canescens is a variant of the Rhododendron molle plant, also known as the dwarf rhododendron, a shrub native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rhododendron molle f. canescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create teas, tonics, and salves for various health applications.
